Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class LetterOfIntent

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.LetterOfIntent
public class LetterOfIntent extends Object
LetterOfIntent - Letter of Intent (LOI). An LOI allows investors to receive sales charge discounts based on a commitment to buy a specified monetary amount of shares over a period of time, usually 13 months.

  • Constructor Details

    • LetterOfIntent

      public LetterOfIntent(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends OrderAmount> amount, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends PeriodStartDate> periodStartDate)

      public LetterOfIntent()

  • Method Details

    • amount

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OrderAmount> amount()
      The amount of the LOI. This is a monetary value in the same currency as the order.

    • periodStartDate

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<PeriodStartDate> periodStartDate()
      The period start date, specific to the US Eastern Time Zone, of the LOI. Date range: 90 days in the past and 13 months in the future from the order_date.

    • builder

      public static final LetterOfIntent.Builder builder()

    • withAmount

      public LetterOfIntent withAmount(OrderAmount amount)
      The amount of the LOI. This is a monetary value in the same currency as the order.

    • withAmount

      public LetterOfIntent withAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends OrderAmount> amount)
      The amount of the LOI. This is a monetary value in the same currency as the order.

    • withPeriodStartDate

      public LetterOfIntent withPeriodStartDate(PeriodStartDate periodStartDate)
      The period start date, specific to the US Eastern Time Zone, of the LOI. Date range: 90 days in the past and 13 months in the future from the order_date.

    • withPeriodStartDate

      public LetterOfIntent withPeriodStartDate(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends PeriodStartDate> periodStartDate)
      The period start date, specific to the US Eastern Time Zone, of the LOI. Date range: 90 days in the past and 13 months in the future from the order_date.
